headline: S&P 500 Stock Ulta Beauty's Earnings Are Ugly But This Is Why Analysts Remain Positive
summary: S&P 500 stock Ulta Beauty's earnings for the fiscal fourth-quarter missed analyst estimates with fiscal 2026 profit guidance also coming in slightly below the consensus view.  Ulta Beauty shares sank in Friday's stock market but analysts appear to remain positive on the S&P 500 component.  Ulta Beauty late Thursday announced fiscal Q4 EPS fell 5.3% to $8.01 as revenue increased 11.5% to $3.89 billion.

headline: Are Ulta Beauty’s (ULTA) Wellness Push and Buybacks Reframing Its Long-Term Profit Story?
summary: Ulta Beauty recently reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results showing higher sales but lower net income, while also completing a US$1.20 billion share repurchase and issuing fiscal 2026 guidance that calls for mid-single-digit net sales and operating income growth and diluted EPS of US$28.05 to US$28.55. Separately, wellness brand Cymbiotika announced it will launch on Ulta.com, the Ulta app, and in over 1,000 stores with an Ulta-exclusive NAD+ product, underscoring Ulta’s push...
